name_en: BV 2024 Fall/Winter New Arrival: Super Unique Wax Leather Tote. Made from soft calfskin, it feels soft and warm. The simple colors are very attractive, and the capacity is amazing; a laptop fits easily. It is unisex, truly a must-have. Cool, chic, and premium. Let it become your most intimate bag this autumn.
